title: Trainee - Web QA
description:
Position : Trainee - Web QA

Educational Qualification : B.E./ B.Tech in Computer Science/ BCA/ MCA

Duration: 6 Months + PPO Based on Performance

Job Location : Pune (On-site)

About Amura

Amura Marketing is a next generation Martech company, delivering end-to-end marketing and sales solutions to leading brands in India.The company's ethos is built upon the philosophy of 'Marketing Engineered', an approach that delivers marketing & sales solutions through innovative ideas in design, engineering and technology.

Role Within The Organization

Amura is looking for a smart and detail-oriented Software Tester who understands the intricacies of web-application testing.

Responsibilities


Define test cases covering all scenarios of a web application across all interfaces
Execute test cases to assure high quality delivery of the application
Be hands on in testing different user interfaces, backend servers, build/maintain the automation test suite, performance and stress testing
Collaborate with Account Managers and developers to get defects resolved.


Desired Skills & Experience


Minimum of a bachelor’s degree in engineering.
Excellent debugging /diagnostic, logical and analytical skills.
Familiarity with SQL,HTML and Javascript.
Good understanding of SDLC and Agile methodologies.


Share with someone awesome

title: Marketplace Intern
description:
Marketing Lab, based in Kolkata, is a leading performance marketing agency specializing in scaling D2C brands. We enhance digital presence and drive results, proudly collaborating with 15 Shark Tank brands!




We are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Marketplace Intern to support our e-commerce operations across platforms like Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, and more. The role involves assisting with product listing creation and optimization, conducting keyword and competitor research, tracking performance metrics, coordinating with design/content teams, and helping manage day-to-day marketplace tasks. This internship is a great opportunity to gain hands-on experience in marketplace management, digital marketing, and e-commerce analytics while working closely with our core team.




Details:

Duration: 4 months
Type: Full-time
Stipend: INR 7500/- per month
Location: Hinjewadi, Pune




The Exciting Part:

On successful completion of your internship, you might be offered a full-time job.

title: Trainee, SAP Basis
description:
Company Description

At Konecranes, we believe that great customer experience is built on the people behind the Konecranes name. Everything we do, we do with passion and drive. We believe diversity drives business success and is the foundation for our growth. We welcome different backgrounds and skills that enrich our community and we promote a place where we can ALL be ourselves. This is what makes Konecranes a unique place to work.

Job Description

Konecranes Information Technology organization secures sustainable growth and operational excellence through IT Innovation and data insights. The service portfolio is wide; from IT services provided to enable Konecranes business processes, through Helpdesk, all the way to the business intelligence and analytics identifying new business opportunities.

We are currently seeking candidate for a Trainee position in the SAP Basis within our organization. This role offers the opportunity to expand your knowledge of the Overall SAP Basis Administration and familiarize yourself with the technologies utilized at Konecranes. Additionally, you will have the chance to work on BTP, Azure platform.

Your key responsibilities:


Daily monitoring of all SAP systems (e.g. work processes, users, system logs, short dumps, locks, developer traces, system traces, disk space, profile parameter maintenance etc.)
Analyzing system Performance and adjusting various tuning parameters to maintain optimum utilization including application server load balancing, operation modes, background jobs management
Configure and manage the SAP printing subsystem for all SAP instances
Knowledge of Kernel upgrade, Support Pack Stack Upgrade, STMS configuration, Database patching for SAP NetWeaver Platform is desirable.
SAP Solution Manager Change Request Management functionality (ChaRM) from basis point of view and cCTS, Solution Manager configurations are seen as big advantage
Exhibit Konecranes Core values and code of conduct into each action
Furthermore, adherence to operational procedures compliant with audit requirements is imperative.
Awareness of ISO 14001 and 45001 standards


Qualifications

What should you bring?

0-2 years of experience in IT industry working in global support or business process monitoring environment.

IT skills:


Certified SAP BASIS Administrator
Experience in monitoring for S/4 Hana systems.
Must have Knowledge about SAP ERP System monitoring & Administration tasks
Good troubleshooting skills
Good to have experience in General System administration.
Good to have Knowledge of S/4 HANA database administration tasks.
Good to have Knowledge of Linux administration tasks
Should be comfortable using basic MS-Office tools (Excel, Word, Outlook etc.)


General Skills:


Strong interpersonal skills are essential, demonstrating both the capability to work autonomously and collaboratively within team dynamics as required.
Effective communication and presentation abilities are crucial.
Should be flexible to take up any challenge offered based on business need.
Nice to have experience in interacting with the global team set-up.
Team player
English Communication skills – Verbal, Written
Willing to work in shifts when necessary


Additional Information

We offer our employees


Competitive Salary
Work-Life balance
Innovative and dynamic working environment
Possibility to work in leading crane building company with leading technology.


Why join us?

We are a global company with history dating back to 1910 - with future looking attitude that has brought us here today. Now together, we are shaping the next generation of material handling for smarter and safer world.

We believe in creating a workplace that is built on trust, flexibility, friendliness and inclusivity towards each other and culture with open communication and low hierarchy. We are a strong expert organisation where you are able to use modern tools and technologies - while embracing agile methodologies and continuous learning and development.

What we offer you?


We will provide comprehensive training on SAP standard processes currently utilized at Konecranes.
This will include hands-on experience working with SAP S/4 Hana Administration and SAP BTP platform and engaging directly with different teams.
Professional challenges in a big ERP program.
Insight to world class global IT Service Delivery
Support of an excellent Global Core team and IT Service Delivery Team


Want to learn more about Konecranes IT and what your future colleagues have to say? Visit our IT career pages on www.konecranes.com/careers/explore-our-roles/it-careers

Interested?

If this role sparked your interest, please submit your application by 15.05.2025, at latest, on our career site. We will contact you after the application period at latest.

Have questions? Please feel free to write at - harshita.agrahari@konecranes.com

Konecranes moves what matters. We are a global leader in material handling solutions, serving a broad range of customers across multiple industries. We consistently set the industry benchmark, from everyday improvements to the breakthroughs at moments that matter most, because we know we can always find a safer, more productive and sustainable way. That's why, with 16 000+ professionals in over 50 countries, we are trusted every day to lift, handle and move what the world needs.

Konecranes is committed to ensuring that all employees and job applicants are treated fairly in an environment which is free from any form of discrimination.
Show more

title: Sales & Project Intern
description:
🚀 Role: Sales & Project Intern

📍 Pune | 💰 ₹35,000/month + Performance Incentives

🎯 About Us

At All Home Living LLP, we create luxury audio-visual and home automation experiences for premium residences and commercial spaces.

From immersive home theatres and multi-room audio to high-end automation, we collaborate with top architects and discerning clients to deliver world-class solutions.

Our Focal powered by Naim Experience Centre, Pune is where clients experience sound at its absolute best.

⚡ About the Role

This is not a conventional internship.

You will work directly with the founder, gaining real exposure to client psychology, high-value sales, system design, and execution.

If you’re looking for a role where you actually learn business, not just “assist” — this is it.

🎯 What You’ll Do

Conduct and assist in premium client demos (home theatre, stereo, automation)
Understand client needs and contribute to solution building discussions
Support project execution from concept to completion
Attend site visits and coordinate with teams
Help prepare proposals, BOQs, and presentations
Manage follow-ups and daily operational tasks
Shadow the founder in client meetings & deal closures

🧠 Who We’re Looking For

Strong communication and confidence with clients
Interest in music, technology, luxury products, or design
Someone sharp, observant, and hungry to learn
Ability to take ownership and move fast
Comfortable being on-site and interacting with people
Prior exposure to AV/tech is a plus (not mandatory)

💰 Compensation & Growth

₹35,000/month fixed salary
Attractive performance-based incentives (linked to projects & closures)
Fast-track growth into Client Experience / Sales / Project roles
Direct mentorship from the founder
Exposure to high-value deals & premium clientele

🌟 Why This Role Stands Out

High-paying internship (well above market average)
Real involvement in luxury projects & client interactions
Learn how high-ticket sales and execution actually works
Build skills that most people take years to develop

📩 How to Apply

Send your CV + a short note on why this role excites you

title: Article Trainee
description:
Job Title: Chartered Accountancy (CA) Articleship Trainee

Location: Kothrud Pune

Department: Audit and Taxation

Reporting To: Article Supervisor / Senior Manager.

Duration : 2 Years (Rotation)

 

  

Job Summary

 

We are looking for enthusiastic and dedicated CA Articleship trainees under the new ICAI scheme. The trainee will gain hands-on exposure to audit, taxation, accounting, and compliance assignments, with structured learning and professional development.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

GST return filing & compliance
Income Tax return preparation
Handling notices & assessments
Tax planning support
Conduct internal & statutory audits
Assist in financial statement preparation
Ensure compliance with regulatory standards
Client coordination and documentation

 

Eligibility Criteria

 

* Passed CA Foundation and registered for CA Intermediate (New Scheme)

* Must have basic understanding of accounting and tax concepts

* Willingness to learn and take ownership of tasks

* Good communication and interpersonal skills

* Proficiency in MS Excel, Word, and accounting software is an advantage

 

What We Offer

 

* Exposure to diversified areas – audit, taxation, compliance

* Friendly and professional work culture

* Regular training, guidance, and mentorship

* Stipend as per firm policy and ICAI guidelines

* Opportunity to work with a range of clients across sectors

*Rotation for Tax and Audit department

 

How to Apply

Interested candidates can send their CV hc@dahotresso.com (02067426111).

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: Growth Marketing / Digital Marketing Intern
description:
About the company:




We transform the way people do business by providing creative solutions for every business' needs. Providing digital success to businesses is our goal and we believe in developing reliable and scalable solutions for businesses that can run on any OS and device. We also provide support and guidance to researchers and academic scholars in 12+ programming languages. Our services include Ul/UX design, Application development, Application deployment, Application testing, Cloud application development, Data analytics, Machine learning application development, Software as a service, and much more.




About the Internship:




Duration: 2 Months




Location: Remote




Position: Part-Time Internship




Stipend: Unpaid (Completion Certificate Provided)




Are you passionate about digital marketing and eager to gain hands-on experience in Facebook Marketing? Corenest Tech LLP is offering a structured internship designed to help you master Facebook marketing strategies, optimize business pages, generate leads, and boost engagement.




This internship includes comprehensive training modules covering Facebook marketing essentials, content creation, lead generation, and community engagement. You will also get exposure to LinkedIn Marketing, Business Directory Listings, YouTube & Instagram Marketing, and Quora & Reddit engagement strategies.




Key Responsibilities:




Set up and optimize Facebook business pages.
Create engaging content and graphics using Canva.
Manage community interactions and generate leads.
Implement content-sharing strategies to expand reach.
Work on LinkedIn marketing strategies for networking and brand visibility.
List businesses in directories across various countries for SEO optimization.
Assist in YouTube and Instagram marketing, including webinar promotions and short-form content creation.




What You'll Learn:




Hands-on experience with Facebook marketing and lead generation.
Best practices for creating and managing content across social media platforms.
Professional networking and engagement strategies on LinkedIn.
SEO and visibility enhancement through business directory listings.
Video marketing strategies for YouTube and Instagram.
Al-powered content creation for Quora and Reddit engagement.




You can also drop your resumes at - g.varsha@researchnest.space

title: Educator Intern
description:
Company Description


Aura Learn is on a mission to redefine the future of education through innovation and purpose. We are creating a cutting-edge educational ecosystem that empowers learners with engaging and meaningful experiences. Focused on 21st-century skills and cognitive development, our approach emphasizes active and experiential learning. At Aura Learn, we prioritize a learner-centric model to provide future-ready education that aligns with the evolving needs of the modern world.


Role Description


This is an on-site role based in the Pune Division for an Educator Intern. The Educator Intern will be responsible for crafting lesson plans, facilitating engaging teaching sessions, training learners, and effectively implementing educational strategies. The role includes collaborating with team members to deliver innovative and impactful learning experiences to foster the development of critical and cognitive skills in learners.


Qualifications

Proficiency in Lesson Planning and Education fundamentals
Strong Communication and Teaching skills
Experience in Training and facilitating active learning activities
Passion for innovative and learner-focused education
Adaptability and eagerness to contribute to a dynamic team
Pursuing or completed a degree in Education, Psychology, or related fields is preferred

title: CA Finalist Article
description:
Opportunity: Article Trainee – GST & Indirect Taxes




Recently cleared CA - Intermediate Examination? We're hiring Articled Assistants across service lines.




🌐 CA Articleship that gives that real world expsoure before becoming CA.




At CA Pritam Mahure & Associates (PMA), GST isn’t a department — it’s our speciality.




We’re inviting CA Finalists who want to experience the real world of GST through advisory, litigation, and transaction structuring across industries and cities.




💼 What You’ll Work On




Assisting in advisory, litigation, audits, and compliance across multiple states.
Drafting replies, preparing submissions, and supporting in Notices, Assesements & appellate matters

🏗 Real Estate & Infrastructure

🏭 Manufacturing & EPC & Pharma

💻 IT & Services

🚗 Auto & Ancillary and

🏢 Startups, Listed Companies, FMCG, Technology Driven Companies (Diverse client base across India)

Exposure to client and GST Authorities interactions, departmental proceedings, and research assignments
Supporting presentations, industry workshops, and publications on emerging GST issues




🧭 What We’re Looking For




CA Article Assistant/ CA Trainee (CA Finalist) passionate about GST
Good analytical, writing, and communication skills
Willingness to learn, travel, and take ownership
Based in or willing to relocate to Pune
Stipend - As per Market Standards




🎯 What will you gain




You’ll work with clients across India, industries, and authorities — seeing how GST shapes real business decisions.
Every assignment deepens your legal understanding and sharpens your professional edge.




📩 Apply at: sahil.tharani@lawgical.in

title: Content writer Intern
company: Clinical Research Courses in Pune - TechnoBridge Systems Pvt Ltd
description:
Company Description

TechnoBridge, with locations in Pune and Bangalore, provides excellent online and offline training in Clinical Research, Medical Coding, Pharmacovigilance, Medical Writing, Regulatory Affairs, and Clinical Data Management. Known for its expert faculty and state-of-the-art facilities, TechnoBridge prepares students to be industry-ready with comprehensive training and 100% placement assistance. Additional services include mock interviews and resume-building guidance to support career development. Join TechnoBridge to gain the skills needed for a successful career in the healthcare sector.

Role Description

This is a full-time, on-site internship for a Content Writer based in the Pune Division. The Content Writer Intern will focus on creating and editing web content, developing content strategies, conducting research on relevant topics, writing compelling material, and proofreading content for accuracy and quality. The role offers an opportunity to work closely with the content team and contribute to informative and engaging resources in the field of clinical research and healthcare.

Qualifications


Proficiency in Web Content Writing and Writing
Understanding of Content Strategy and the ability to develop impactful strategies
Strong Research and Proofreading skills
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Ability to work collaboratively in an on-site environment
Enthusiasm for healthcare and clinical research topics
Enrollment in or recent graduation from a degree program in English, Journalism, Healthcare, Life Sciences, or a related field
.

title: Business Analyst Intern
description:
Business Analyst Intern

Company: WebBoost Solutions by UM

Location: Remote

Duration: 3 Months

Employment Type: Internship (Full-time opportunity based on performance)

About the Company




WebBoost Solutions by UM is a technology and consulting organization focused on helping businesses grow through data-driven insights and digital solutions. The company provides practical exposure and industry-relevant training, enabling students and graduates to gain real-world experience in business analysis, data interpretation, and strategic decision-making.

About the Role

As a Business Analyst Intern, you will work on analyzing business processes, preparing reports and dashboards, gathering requirements, and supporting data-driven decision-making. This role provides hands-on experience in understanding business operations and converting data into actionable insights.




Responsibilities

Analyze business processes and identify improvement opportunities
Prepare reports and dashboards to present business insights
Gather and document business requirements
Support data-driven decision-making within projects
Assist teams in interpreting business and operational data




Qualifications

Students or recent graduates in Business, Business Analytics, Data Analytics, or related fields
Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills
Interest in business strategy and data interpretation




Required Skills

Knowledge of Microsoft Excel
Knowledge of Microsoft PowerPoint




Preferred Skills

Familiarity with Power BI
Familiarity with Tableau




Compensation & Benefits

Stipend: ₹7,500 – ₹15,000 (Performance-Based) (Paid)

Certificate of Internship
Letter of Recommendation
Opportunity to work on live business analysis projects
Potential full-time opportunity based on performance

Equal Opportunity Statement

WebBoost Solutions by UM is committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace. We encourage applicants from all backgrounds to apply.

title: Business Development Intern
description:
We are looking for Business Development Interns who are driven, self-motivated and highly passionate about working in the Ed-tech space while impacting careers via quality education & expert mentorship. If you are someone who is proactive, detail oriented, and thrives in a fast-paced environment, then this is for you. You’ll work closely with a diverse group of people coming from both leading MNCs such as McKinsey, KPMG, Deloitte, EY, and startups such as Paytm etc. to establish, nurture, and grow business across categories & territories.This is an amazing opportunity to learn from an extraordinary team, grow massively and help students around the globe build an awesome career for themselves.

What Will You Do

Conduct outreach by making calls to prospective students to persuade them to enroll in study abroad programs.

Identify students who are suitable candidates for studying abroad and pitch our programs effectively to them.

Educate students on the benefits of studying abroad, including personal growth, career opportunities, and cultural experiences.

Maintain accurate records of calls and student interactions in the CRM system.

Collaborate with the sales and marketing teams to develop strategies for reaching target audiences.

Assist in organizing events or webinars to promote study abroad opportunities

Who Can Apply

Available for a full-time, in-office internship starting immediately.

Available for 3 months.

Recently completed a degree in Business, Marketing, Communications, or related field.

Possess strong communication, interpersonal, and teamwork skills.

Proficient in MS Office or G Suite.

Experience in sales or customer service is a plus, but not mandatory.

Passionate about education and helping students achieve their goals.

What Will You Get

Be a part of the fast-growing startup defining strategies for the growth of the company.

Partner in building a global Ed-tech company that is going to impact hundreds of thousands of lives.

Phenomenal work environment, with massive ownership and excellent growth opportunities

We offer a competitive stipend designed to recognize your contributions during the internship period, along with a certificate upon successful completion.

title: Product Marketing Intern
description:
About Joveo

As the global leader in AI-powered, high-performance recruitment marketing, Joveo is transforming talent attraction and recruitment media buying for the world’s largest employers, staffing firms, RPOs, and media agencies. The Joveo platform enables businesses to attract, source, engage, and hire the best candidates on time and within budget.

Backed by marquee investors like Nexus Ventures Partners, Joveo has been featured in Inc. Magazine’s List of America’s Fastest-Growing Private Companies for three years.

Powering millions of jobs every day, Joveo’s data-driven recruitment marketing platform uses advanced data science and machine learning to dynamically manage and optimize talent sourcing and applications across all online channels while providing real-time insights at every step of the job seeker journey, from click to hire.




For more information about Joveo’s award-winning platform, visit www.joveo.com




Job Description:

We are looking for a motivated and enthusiastic Product Marketing Intern to join our dynamic marketing team. This internship offers the opportunity to gain hands-on experience in B2B SaaS product marketing, supporting various initiatives and campaigns that drive product awareness, adoption, and growth.




Responsibilities:

Assist in the development and execution of product marketing strategies and campaigns.
Conduct market research to identify trends, customer needs, and competitive landscape.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including product management, sales, and design, to create compelling marketing materials.
Help manage and update product-related content across various channels, including website, social media, and email campaigns.
Support the creation and distribution of product collateral such as brochures, datasheets, and presentations.
Monitor and report on the performance of marketing campaigns and product launches.
Assist with the planning and execution of product events, webinars, and other promotional activities.




Qualifications:

Currently pursuing a degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field.
Strong interest in product marketing and technology.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
Familiarity with marketing tools and platforms (e.g., Google Analytics, social media management tools) is a plus.
Creative thinking and problem-solving skills.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.




What We Offer:

Hands-on experience with real-world marketing projects.
Mentorship and guidance from experienced marketing professionals.
Opportunity to develop and enhance your skills in a fast-paced, innovative environment.
Flexible working hours to accommodate your academic schedule.
Potential for future full-time opportunities based on performance.

title: Content & Social Media Intern
description:
Job Title

Content & Social Media Intern

Duration

3–6 months

Location

Mumbai | In-office

About The Role

We’re looking for a Content & Social Media Intern to support our content engine across platforms. This role is ideal for someone who is curious, creative, willing to learn and is interested in finance and investment products, and wants to build a long-term career in this space.

This is not a physical or consumer product - you won’t be shooting products or lifestyle reels. The work is focused on ideas, narratives, hooks, clarity, and distribution, especially for platforms like LinkedIn and Instagram.

You’ll work closely with the leadership team and learn how investment brands are built through content, credibility, and consistency.

What You’ll Work On

Content Writing & Ideation


Support in writing:
LinkedIn posts
Short-form captions
Blogs and newsletters (research + drafts)
Generate multiple content ideas regularly, including:
Hooks
Angles
Formats (carousels, short videos, explainers, threads, repost edits)
Help convert market updates, ideas, and internal notes into clear, well-structured content drafts

Social Media Support & Distribution


Support day-to-day posting and distribution across LinkedIn and Instagram
Repurpose one content idea into multiple formats for different platforms
Track basic performance (reach, engagement) and identify patterns
Help resurface and reuse high-performing content

On-Camera & Video Support


Comfortable facing the camera when required
Shoot simple, quick videos using a phone (market takes, explainers, repost-style content)
Assist in recording short-form videos for social platforms
Willing to experiment with different camera styles, formats, and delivery

Research & Learning


Research market trends, creator formats, and finance-focused content
Track what founders, finance creators, and investment brands are doing on social media
Proactively suggest new ideas, formats, and experiments

AI & Tools (Strong Plus)


Comfortable using AI tools to assist with content work:
Gemini / Claude for ideation and first drafts
Familiar with or eager to learn basic design and editing tools:
Canva
CapCut / InShot
Ability to improve AI-generated drafts with original thought, clarity, and brand tone

What We’re Looking For


Strong interest in finance, markets, investing, or fintech
Clear intent to build a career in finance or investment products
Good writing skills and ability to simplify complex ideas
Comfortable experimenting, learning fast, and iterating/learning AI tools
Open to feedback and multiple revisions
Prior experience (college projects, writing samples, creator pages, internships) is a plus

Important Context


This is an investment product
There is no physical product to shoot or showcase
The role is focused on thought leadership and clarity, not lifestyle or influencer content

What You’ll Gain


Hands-on experience creating content for a finance/investment brand
Opportunity to convert into a full-time content, social, or brand role

How to Apply

Please Share


Any writing samples, social media pages, or projects
A short note on why you’re interested in finance or investment products
Show more

title: Artificial Intelligence Intern
description:
Artificial Intelligence Intern

Company: Inficore Soft

Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-time Internship

Duration: 1–3 Months

Stipend: ₹16,000 per month




About Inficore Soft:

Inficore Soft is a technology-driven organization focused on building intelligent systems, automation solutions, and advanced analytics platforms. We leverage modern AI technologies to solve real-world business problems and provide hands-on learning opportunities to aspiring professionals.




Role Overview:

We are looking for an Artificial Intelligence Intern who is eager to work on AI-based solutions and intelligent systems. This role offers practical exposure to AI concepts, model development, and real-world implementation.




Key Responsibilities:

• Assist in developing and implementing AI models and solutions

• Work on data preprocessing and feature engineering

• Support machine learning and deep learning model development

• Research AI techniques and emerging trends

• Evaluate and optimize model performance

• Collaborate with team members on AI-driven projects

• Document experiments and technical processes




Required Qualifications:

• Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, Data Science, or a related field

• Basic understanding of AI and machine learning concepts

• Knowledge of Python programming

• Familiarity with libraries such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or scikit-learn

• Understanding of data structures and algorithms

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Ability to work independently in a remote setup




Preferred Skills:

• Exposure to AI or machine learning projects

• Basic understanding of deep learning and neural networks

• Familiarity with data analysis and visualization




What You Will Gain:

• Hands-on experience in AI development and real-world applications

• Exposure to advanced technologies and tools

• Mentorship from experienced professionals

• Opportunity to enhance technical and research skills

• Certificate of completion based on performance




Inficore Soft is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering a learning-driven and inclusive work environment.

title: Social Media Marketing Intern
description:
Social Media Marketing Internship | MJ Marketing Consultancy

title: Business Development- Trainee
description:
Location: Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, Delhi & Mumbai | Duration: 6 months | Stipend: ₹15,000 – ₹20,000/month

Note: High performers will be considered for a full-time role at the end of the internship based on performance.

About Niyo Forex

Niyo Forex is a fintech platform that makes forex simple, affordable and hassle-free for students going abroad and travelers crossing borders. We are growing our partner network and looking for a motivated BD Intern to help expand our channel ecosystem on the ground.

About The Role

This is a field-based sales and business development internship. You will identify, pitch, onboard and manage B2B channel partners such as student counsellors, travel agents and tour operators, who will recommend and cross-sell Niyo Forex to their customers. Most of your time will be spent out in the field building relationships.

What You Will Do


Identify and onboard channel partners such as overseas education consultants, student visa counsellors, travel agents, and tour operators in your territory
Visit partners in person, conduct product demos and build lasting relationships
Ensure onboarded partners are actively recommending Niyo Forex to their customers
Contribute to monthly targets for new partner sign-ups and transaction volume
Train partners with product knowledge, pitch material, and marketing collateral
Track partner activity and share regular updates with your reporting manager
Gather on-ground market intelligence and share insights with the team


What We Are Looking For


Students or fresh graduates in any discipline; prior experience in sales, BD or marketing is a plus.
Strong communication and persuasion skills , you can build rapport quickly and make a clear and compelling pitch.
Comfortable with a field-heavy role and willing to visit partners in person regularly.
Self-driven and target-oriented , you treat a rejection as a starting point, not an ending.
Familiarity or existing contacts in the education consultancy or travel/tourism space is an advantage.
Proficiency in local language(s) of the territory along with English.
Show more

title: Intern
description:
TechnipFMC is committed to driving real change in the energy industry. Our ambition is to build a sustainable future through relentless innovation and global collaboration – and we want you to be part of it. You’ll be joining a culture that values curiosity, expertise, and ideas as well as equal opportunities, inclusion, and authenticity. Bring your unique energy to our team of more than 21,000 people worldwide, and discover a rewarding, fulfilling, and varied career that you can take in anywhere you want to go.

Job Purpose

We are looking for motivated and detail-oriented fresh diploma holders in Mechanical Engineering to join our manufacturing assembly team. This entry-level role offers hands-on training and exposure to the assembly of critical components used in oil and gas operations. Ideal candidates will have a strong foundation in mechanical principles and the ability to communicate effectively in English.

Job Description

Key Responsibilities


Assemble mechanical and electrical components as per engineering drawings and standard operating procedures
Operace hand tools, power tools, and basic machinery safely and efficiently Perform visual inspections and basic quality checks to ensure product accuracy and reliability
Collaborate with team members and supervisors to meet production goals
Maintain a clean and organized work environment
Adhere to safety standards and report any incidents or hazards promptly
Record work activities and maintain accurate production documentation


Qualifications

You are meant for this job if:


Diploma in Mechanical Engineering from a recognized institution
Fresh graduates are welcome: no prior experience required
Ability to read and interpret technical drawings and assembly instructions
Proficiency in reading, writing, and verbal communication in English is mandatory
Basic understanding of mechanical systems and manufacturing processes
Strong attention to detail and willingness. to learn
Physically fit and capable of working in a factory setting


Skills

Manufacturing Processes: Metals / Forging / Casting

Communication

Written and Verbal Communication



Being a global leader in the energy industry requires an inclusive and diverse environment. TechnipFMC promotes diversity, equity, and inclusion by ensuring equal opportunities to all ages, races, ethnicities, religions, sexual orientations, gender expressions, disabilities, or all other pluralities. We celebrate who you are and what you bring. Every voice matters and we encourage you to add to our culture.




TechnipFMC respects the rights and dignity of those it works with and promotes adherence to internationally recognized human rights principles for those in its value chain.
